## Pre-launch Checklist

- Confirm canary cohort selection (5% NA, 5% EU)
- Verify rollback runbook is current
- Validate feature flag default state matches the launch plan
- Smoke test admin console on three browsers
- Re-run integration suite against staging-prod parity
- Confirm support team has the FAQ doc bookmarked
- Schedule the customer-comms email for launch + 30 min
- Verify on-call rotation for the next 24 hours
- Confirm dashboards are pinned in the war-room channel
- Pre-write the success-metrics post-mortem template
- Tag the release in git with the canonical name
- Push the build artifacts to the CDN edge
- Warm the cache for the top 50 entry points
- Confirm Slack incident command channel is pinned
- Arm the synthetic monitoring run schedule
